condition.description: Defines a condition under which the IAM binding applies, using an expression, title, and optional description.

member.description: Specifies the identity to be granted the IAM role, such as a user, group, or service account.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to assign to the member for the subnetwork. Must be a predefined or custom IAM role.

subnetwork.description: Specifies the subnetwork to which the IAM member policy will be applied; must be in the same region as the associated resources.
